name: SortByContainer
description: Sorts a list of points by a list of containers. Output tree always matches curve count with empty branches for curves containing no points.

inputParameters.name: containers
inputParameters.description: Planar closed curves used as containers. Each curve becomes one output branch.

inputParameters.name: points
inputParameters.description: Points to sort into the container curves. If your objects are not points, create representative points first. TIP: use 'Point Inside Polygon' to get interior points for polylines.

outputParameters.name: indices
outputParameters.description: Global point indices sorted by container. Branch k corresponds to containers[k] (empty branch = no points in that container). Use with 'List Item' component to sort original lists.
